list.title: Contacts
list.subtitle: Manage your contact list.
list.totalContacts: {count, plural, one {# total contact.} other {# total contacts.}}
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email...
list.selected: {count, plural, one {# contact selected} other {# contacts selected}}
list.selectAllAria: Select all contacts on this page

deleteDialog.title: Delete Contact
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: {count, plural, one {Delete # Contact} other {Delete # Contacts}}
bulkDeleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete {count, plural, one {# contact} other {# contacts}}? This action cannot be undone.

toasts.bulkDeleted: {count, plural, one {# contact deleted} other {# contacts deleted}}

form.addDescription: Fill in the details to create a new contact.
form.name: Name
form.dupExact: A contact with this phone number already exists.
form.dupSimilar: A contact with a very similar number already exists.
form.countryCodeHint: Include country code, e.g. +1 for US
form.noTags: No tags available. Create tags in Settings.

toasts.duplicateExists: A contact with this phone number already exists
toasts.notLinked: Your profile is not linked to an account.

detail.name: Name
detail.tagsHint: Click a tag to add or remove it from this contact.
detail.noTags: No tags available. Create tags in Settings.
detail.noCustomFields: No custom fields defined. Create them in Settings.

customFields.title: Custom fields
customFields.description: Define extra contact fields (e.g. ZIP code, lead source). They appear on every contact and in the “Update Contact Field” automation action.
customFields.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This also removes its stored value on every contact. This cannot be undone.

toasts.notLinked: Your profile is not linked to an account.
toasts.createFailed: Could not create field. You may not have permission.

import.title: Import Contacts
import.description: Upload a CSV with a required phone column. Optional: name, email, company, tags (comma-separated; quote multi-tag cells).
import.rowsReady: {count, plural, one {# row ready} other {# rows ready}}
import.chooseFile: Click to choose a CSV file
import.tagStats: {tags, plural, one {# tag} other {# tags}} · {contacts, plural, one {# contact} other {# contacts}}
import.moreRows: {count, plural, one {+ # more row not shown} other {+ # more rows not shown}}
import.resultTags: {count, plural, one {# tag assigned} other {# tags assigned}}
import.importButton: {count, plural, =0 {Import contacts} one {Import # contact} other {Import # contacts}}

toasts.noRows: No valid rows found. Ensure CSV has a "phone" column header.
toasts.notLinked: Your profile is not linked to an account.
toasts.tagsPartialFail: Contacts imported, but some tag assignments failed.
toasts.imported: {count, plural, one {# contact imported} other {# contacts imported}}
toasts.tagsApplied: {count, plural, one {# tag assignment applied} other {# tag assignments applied}}
toasts.unknownTagsSkipped: Unknown tags skipped (create them in Settings first): {sample}{more, plural, =0 {} other { (+# more)}}
toasts.duplicatesSkipped: {count, plural, one {# duplicate skipped} other {# duplicates skipped}}
toasts.failedToImport: {count, plural, one {# contact failed to import} other {# contacts failed to import}}
